description_long: This is a metallic urban kiosk mounted on a square stone or concrete base, featuring a combination of silver and gold finishes. The front panel is adorned with ornate gold trim and a black display area, possibly for information or interaction. The sides and rear of the kiosk are punctuated with perforated text and patterns, with the rear panel notably marked by several red, blood-like handprints and smears, adding a dramatic or vandalized appearance. The upper section includes a gold metallic structure with bolts and a possible slot or dispensing mechanism. The kiosk is solidly built, with no visible windows or doors, and is designed to be a fixed, non-enterable structure. Its overall appearance is modern with decorative elements, suggesting a blend of functional and ornamental urban design.
description: A silver and gold metallic urban kiosk on a stone base, featuring ornate trim, a black display, and dramatic red handprints on the rear. The structure is solid, modern, and non-enterable.
description_view_0: Front view shows ornate gold trim, a black display panel, and the main interactive area of the kiosk.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a plain metallic surface with perforated text and some red stains on the stone base.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights multiple red, blood-like handprints and smears on the metallic surface, with perforated text above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows a clean metallic panel with perforated text and minor red stains on the base.
attribute_signage_type: Perforated text signage on side and rear panels; black display panel with ornate gold trim on front; no illuminated or digital signs visible.
attribute_roof_design: Flat metallic roof with gold decorative elements and visible bolts; no overhangs or awnings.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern with ornamental trim and industrial influences
